title: Citrusy Fluffy Egyptian Chicken Wrap
description: A fragrant, citrus-infused chicken wrap with fluffy texture, served in soft naan and topped with fresh cucumber-perfect for a midnight craving.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat (~200 °C). Warm the naan on the grill for about 30 seconds each side, then set aside.
Whisk together flour, yogurt, lemon juice, orange zest, olive oil, cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper until a thick paste forms. The consistency should be thick enough to coat the chicken.
Pat the chicken breasts dry with paper towels. Coat each breast thoroughly with the yogurt mixture, pressing to adhere, and let rest for 5 minutes to absorb flavors.
Place the coated chicken on the hot grill and cook 6–7 minutes per side, or until the internal temperature reaches 75 °C (165 °F) and the juices run clear. Flip once during cooking.
Remove the chicken from the grill and let it rest for 5 minutes. Then slice the chicken into long strips.
To assemble, lay a warmed naan on a plate. Spread a spoonful of any remaining yogurt mixture (optional) over the center, then add a handful of cucumber slices followed by the sliced chicken.
Fold the naan over the filling, roll tightly, and slice if desired. Serve immediately for maximum freshness.
Optionally drizzle a bit more fresh lemon juice or a drizzle of extra yogurt sauce for added zing.
